title: MemoryEntry

id.description: Stable URN identifying this memory entry (urn:srcos:memory:<id>).

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

kind.description: Category of memory: 'rule' (explicit instruction), 'learned' (inferred pattern), or 'recap' (session summary).

key.description: Human-readable key within the namespace identifying this specific memory.

payloadRef.description: URN or path pointing to the full content of this memory entry.

authoritativeRef.description: Optional URN of a source document that this memory was derived from.

citationRefs.description: URNs of sessions or documents that provide evidence for this memory.

scope.description: Scope restrictions: workspace, pathPrefixes, and optional sessionRef.

freshness.description: Freshness tracking: learnedAt (required), reviewedAt, and ttl (seconds).

description: A durable knowledge entry stored in the agent's persistent memory layer, classified by kind (explicit rule, learned pattern, or session recap), with namespace scoping and freshness tracking.
